scope.target: Backlog release targeting, completion, and publication metadata
constraints: Use unassigned instead of guessing a target release
Allow published_in to remain null between completion and publication
Derive historical published versions from Git tag ancestry
non_goals: Duplicate workflow task progress in the roadmap
Assign OBS-001 to a release without an architecture decision

steps: Define the release target/completed/published metadata contract
Determine first containing tags for all resolved backlog items
Move the long-lived roadmap to the backlog root
Add fail-closed validator coverage and GWT tests
execution.last_completed_step: Added and populated release metadata, moved the roadmap to .dev/backlog/ROADMAP.md, and added validator coverage.
execution.next_action: Maintain target, completed_in, and published_in whenever a backlog item or release state changes.

results.summary: Every backlog item now declares its target, completion, and publication release state; resolved items are tied to v0.1.0 by Git ancestry, and the roadmap has a dedicated long-lived backlog-root entry.
tests_run: Workflow artifact validation passed for 19 post-adoption workflows, 39 indexed workflow directories, and 11 backlog items
All six task JSON files parsed
results.residual_risk: Target versions remain planning commitments and must be updated when roadmap decisions change.
